name: Macy Gray
abstract: Natalie Renée McIntyre (born September 6, 1967), known professionally as Macy Gray, is an American R&B and soul singer. She is known for her distinctive raspy voice and a singing style heavily influenced by Billie Holiday.

concerts.label: Rainforest Foundation Benefit Concert
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage
